name: {{ app_name }} - Infrastructure Monitoring
description: Comprehensive infrastructure monitoring dashboard for {{ app_name }}

widgets.title: CPU Usage Overview
widgets.nrql_query: SELECT average(cpuPercent) FROM SystemSample WHERE entity.name = '{{ app_name }}' TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: Memory Usage Overview
widgets.nrql_query: SELECT average(memoryUsedPercent) FROM SystemSample WHERE entity.name = '{{ app_name }}' TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: Disk Usage by Volume
widgets.nrql_query: SELECT average(diskUsedPercent) FROM StorageSample WHERE entity.name = '{{ app_name }}' FACET device TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: Network I/O
widgets.nrql_query: SELECT average(networkReceiveBytesPerSecond), average(networkTransmitBytesPerSecond) FROM SystemSample WHERE entity.name = '{{ app_name }}' TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: Load Average
widgets.nrql_query: SELECT average(loadAverageOneMinute), average(loadAverageFiveMinute), average(loadAverageFifteenMinute) FROM SystemSample WHERE entity.name = '{{ app_name }}' TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: Process Count
widgets.nrql_query: SELECT average(processCount) FROM SystemSample WHERE entity.name = '{{ app_name }}' TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: System Uptime
widgets.nrql_query: SELECT average(systemUptime) FROM SystemSample WHERE entity.name = '{{ app_name }}' TIMESERIES AUTO
